name: Create booking orchestrator
description: Create new hotel booking: upserts guest contact, validates room availability for date range, creates Opportunity and Booking__c records, marks room Reserved. Requires guest_email, guest_first_name, guest_last_name, room_number, check_in_date, check_out_date; optional guest_phone, number_of_guests (default: 1), special_requests, booking_external_id. Returns booking confirmation or error codes (400: room not found, 409: room not available for dates).
